summary:
THWARTED TERRORISM AND STRATEGIC CITY HOTSPOTS: Brandon discusses a recent event in Utah where a fuse lit underneath a news vehicle failed to detonate, attributing the prevention of this tragedy to collective prayer. He emphasizes the need for continuous spiritual protection over cities and mentions that God explicitly instructed him to pray for Chicago, Boston, Philadelphia, New York City, and Washington, D.C., identifying them as strategic hotspots requiring daily intercession.

GEOPOLITICAL TENSIONS AND THE MIDDLE EAST: Brandon reacts to a speech by a European official concerning the ongoing conflict in Gaza, man-made famine, and the financial suffocation of the Palestinian Authority. He points out that the official's push for a two-state solution, potential sanctions on extremist Israeli ministers, and the suspension of trade agreements align perfectly with his prior spiritual warnings. Brandon predicts a significant United Nations push to divide the land of Israel and recognize a Palestinian state during the week of September 21st, warning that September will be a month of great acceleration. He also foresees major plots to destabilize the Israeli government and an attempt on the life of Benjamin Netanyahu.

OCCULT ACTIVITY AND EUROPEAN UNREST: Brandon shares a vision over Berlin where a swastika appeared in the sky like a bat-signal, originating from a demonic ritual involving human sacrifice. He explains that global elitists and occultists are utilizing witchcraft, with spiritual ties to the CERN collider, to summon a Hitler-like demonic spirit over Europe to incite a new wave of extreme anti-Semitism, war, and ethnic cleansing. Furthermore, Brandon anticipates severe civil unrest and anarchy erupting in France, suggesting its leadership is tilling the ground for the Antichrist and the eventual emergence of the Mahdi.

VATICAN SHAKING AND CATHOLIC REVIVAL: Brandon prophesies a massive physical and spiritual shaking in Italy, specifically describing an earthquake that will strike the Vatican and cause massive, dangerous cracks in its ancient foundational walls. He interprets this structural damage as highly symbolic of an impending, historic revival and outpouring of the Holy Spirit upon the 1.4 billion Catholics worldwide. He anticipates a profound spiritual awakening that will rectify doctrinal issues and bring radical transformation to the Catholic Church.

FINANCIAL FORECASTS AND CYBER SECURITY THREATS: Brandon issues a stark warning regarding the global financial system, predicting embarrassing cyber breaches at four major banks that will leak private client data, including social security numbers and account information. In response to these vulnerabilities, he sees the implementation of a new AI-driven beast system and an impenetrable two-layer cryptocurrency protection. Additionally, he prophesies the rise of a major tech figure living in the Hamptons who will passionately champion the cryptocurrency Solana, acting as a prominent mouthpiece for the coin in a manner similar to Michael Saylor's advocacy for Bitcoin.

GLOBAL PROPHECIES AND UPCOMING HARVESTS: Brandon forecasts five simultaneous levels of global shaking encompassing politics, the earth's crust, finances, the church, and the heavens. He highlights the approaching timeframe of Rosh Hashanah and the Feast of Trumpets as spiritually significant, predicting an upcoming virus within one to two years and emphasizing a specific window of opportunity tied to Donald Trump's support for the Abrahamic covenant. Finally, Brandon predicts a massive spiritual harvest and the fall of the Iron Curtain in North Korea, stating that leadership figures like Kim and his sister will be dealt with to allow an unprecedented awakening across Asia.
rawData: [September 16, 2025]-[A new Michael Saylor is coming]-[https://youtu.be/OUtFzN2qZuo]-[Good evening, family. Praise the Lord. Thank you for joining me today. Well, I have some things on my heart and I appreciate every single one of you coming out so late this evening. But as I've been praying this afternoon, driving around like I normally do, the Lord had some things to say concerning what's coming. And so, I was just interceding for the nations, like my wife and I do, and our kids. He opened my eyes and he said, "I want to show you some things that are coming. It's very serious." And so, I'm going to go into that for you, but first, I want to show you what we stopped. I believe in prayer. You know, it's amazing when we come together as a body; many hands make light work. And so, I want to play this video for you because I believe this video is a result of our prayer group here. You know, I know there's other people praying, folks, but I believe we have a great push as a body with as many as assembled here together. I mean, there's thousands. I mean, the last video we had over 50,000 people praying within that two-hour period. We had almost 300 salvations, and we give all the glory to God with that. We started a new week now, but in last week, we had over 1,500 people get born again on this channel, and so it made me really excited. I told Braden, I said, "We are making... you know, like when you see those ice breakers going through there, we're busting the ice." And so, nobody lost their life. And in the article, when you read about that, they lit the fuse underneath that news vehicle and it didn't go off. It didn't go off. So, it's faulty. So, that's the hand of God. We see the hand of God in motion protecting our people even whenever they may not even realize that they're being protected. Angels unaware. And I just want to give all the glory to God tonight. It's something to rejoice over because we can see prayers working. So, another thing, this is what the Lord was showing me because I just wanted to recap and show you that, because there were some people that sent that to me and I was just excited about it. I just believe that was in Utah. So, and we know there's much, much more. We know by the spirit of God that there's much, much more people just like this that we're going to pray that their plans would be foiled, that the darkness would be exposed, that the light would shine, and that God would get the glory for protecting the people in these last days. I told you, if you are in that area, if you're in these areas, that you go around pleading the blood of Jesus, applying the blood, going down the streets, praying protection over your city. And I believe as we do this as a body, according to Ephesians, that we are seated with him in the heavenlies far above all principalities and powers. I believe that if we take our place of authority, we will stop more and more of things like this in the days ahead. So, it's exciting because the Lord told me, "You must pray for Chicago." Chicago is a hotspot right now. Chicago, Boston, Philadelphia, New York City, and Washington, D.C. Not saying that these other places are not a hotspot, but there's strategic things that the Lord showed me about these five cities that I cannot go into publicly. It just... yeah, I'm just never going to do that right now. So, I just want you to be really... have your eyes open if you live in those areas and praying over your city on a day-to-day basis. And so, we know that the dark is getting darker and the light is getting lighter. Now, this is what I saw today and I'm going to get into it and I'll go over the things that the Lord showed me. And like I said, I'll try to keep this as short as possible, but I want you to hear this lady that's about to speak over... I believe it's the... it's not the United Nations. I don't know what this is, but she spoke and she's saying exactly what we got in prayer. State of the Union. The State of the Union. So, this is a State of the Union... Yeah, yeah. So, go ahead and play this lady. And she's, I guess, some kind of boss or something. I don't know who she is, but she says what we're praying about and what the Lord told us they were going to say. So, I want you to hear part of this. There was part of it that was alarming. Needless to say, it was pretty bad. But just play this. Can you play some of it? Son. Honorable members. What is happening in Gaza has shaken the conscience of the world. People killed while begging for food. Mothers holding lifeless babies. These images are simply catastrophic. So, I want to start with a very clear message: man-made famine can never be a weapon of war. For the sake of the children, for the sake of humanity, this must stop. This is also part of a more systematic shift in the last month that is simply unacceptable. We have seen the financial suffocation of the Palestinian Authority. The plans for settlement project in the so-called E1 area which would easily cut off the occupied West Bank from East Jerusalem, the actions and statements by the most extremist ministers of the Israeli government which incite violence. All of this points to a clear attempt to undermine the two-state solution, to undermine the vision of a viable Palestinian state. And we must not let this happen. And honorable members, it truly pains me to say these words. And I know that for many citizens, Europe's inability to agree on a common way forward is equally painful. They are asking how much worse things must get before there is unity in response. I understand because what is happening in Gaza is unacceptable and because Europe must lead the way, just as it has done before. Our financial support and humanitarian aid far outweigh that of any other partner. Our commitment to a viable Palestinian Authority is keeping the two-state solution alive and we must urge others to urgently step up, both in the region and beyond. But of course, Europe needs to do more. Many, many member states have moved ahead on their own. On our side, we proposed to suspend parts of our Horizon funding, but this is stuck without a majority. We must overcome this. We cannot afford to be paralyzed. And this is why I will propose a package of measures to carve out a way forward. First, the Commission will do all that it can do on its own. We will put our bilateral support to Israel on hold. We will stop all payments in these areas without affecting our work with Israeli civil society or Yad Vashem. We will make two further proposals to the council. We will propose sanctions on the extremist ministers and on violent settlers, and we will also propose a partial suspension of the Association Agreement on trade-related matters. I am aware it will be difficult to find majorities and I know that any action will be too much for one and too little for others. But we must all take our own responsibility: Parliament, council, Commission. My third point: we will set up a Palestine donor group next month, including a dedicated instrument for Gaza reconstruction. This... you basically get the gist of what's going on. I don't need to keep rehearsing everything that the woman's saying and what they want to do. But it's what the Lord told us was coming. Everything that she's saying in front of all those people, and they're applauding, is a two-state solution. They're coming up with a plan for a two-state solution for the week... I believe that we'll see it unfolding in the days ahead even more, for the week of the 21st, 23rd, the main week of the UN. And this is what they voted on on the 11th for a two-state solution to divide the land of Israel, recognizing Palestine as a state. And so, we see the things that the Lord told us were coming in prayer on this channel months ago and it's happening. And that's why the Lord told us, he said, "September will be a month to remember, a great acceleration." Watch the fig tree, which is Israel. Watch these things in the days ahead. And he warned us, and this is a major speech going forth in front of all these people about how to defund it, how to defund Israel, not giving them, doing all these things, and causing—talking about a two-state solution. Well, in prayer today, as I was driving around, I saw—remember, I told you I saw, this would be sensitive to talk about, but I saw out of the Berlin area, I saw a swastika coming up out of the sky that looked like a Batman signal and it started to glow in the air. Well, when I was interceding on behalf of this, I was like, 'Lord, what is this? Why did you show this to me?' He started to show me what this represented and what is going on. I saw satanic people, the occult, that were having satanic practices in these areas, summoning the old Hitler spirit, that demonic spirit that was attached to Hitler. They were summoning it by witchcraft. And I saw actual human sacrifice that was taking place around an altar with a big pentagram on it. And the Lord showed me these elitist people, this group of people that were doing these practices, summoning the demonic spirit that was on Hitler to come on a new entity to rise up war and ethnic cleansing. A new wave of anti-Semitism is coming in a way that we've never seen before in this generation. And as I saw these satanic practices taking place when I was praying, I saw CERN, and there were things that were attached to the hydrogen collider and CERN. And as they were sending up the Batman signal of the swastika, it was in the spirit realm. What the Batman symbol represented in the comic books and what we know is that was what brought Batman to that area. It was his alert. 'We need that. We need Batman, right?' So the Batman symbol went up in the air. So this was a swastika that went up in the air, and it was black, white, and red around it, and it went up as a Batman symbol over the area of Europe. And the Lord showed me that they were summoning in the spirit a demonic wave of a Hitler-type spirit in Europe—this occult practice. As I was praying, I could see an uprising of anarchy in France like we've not seen before, as he was the forerunner paving the way as like the boss of a two-state solution. I told you he would till the ground. He would till the ground and get it ready for the Antichrist to take over. That he was the Ishmael. A lot of people believe he's the Isaac. That he would be the one that—you know, there's always an Ishmael. Before the Isaac, there's the Ishmael. He's the Ishmael. The Isaac is being groomed in the back of a curtain, being groomed by demonic spirits. And I saw the Isaac, and they call him the Mahdi. He's not on the scene yet to the point where what we see of the Ishmael. He'll till the ground. He's getting it ready. He's getting it ready for the Antichrist to take over in the days ahead. But the Lord showed me great civil unrest coming in Europe. And I'll play you some of the clips that are just the beginning right now. Do you have it? Can you do it? This is what's happening in France, I guess, this week. If you live in France and you can verify this, we'd appreciate it. But from what I understand, everything the Lord is showing me is coming to pass with great anti-rhetoric against the government. And it's bad. But the Lord said this is just the beginning; it would start to increase. So you can stop it. So as we see these events taking place, this is what the Lord is warning us. And as I was watching out of Germany, I saw another in the days ahead, but I saw an attempt on Benjamin's life—major—I have to be careful how I say this—plots and plans. That's a good way to say. 'Hey, mute your side, Braden. I don't want to hear me talking.' I saw major plots and plans to take down Israel's government in the days ahead. And the Lord said, 'Pray for the peace over this area because it's tried to bring instability.' And so as I was praying over Israel's government and them making the right choices because of all the anti-Semitism that will rise up in the days ahead, when you see the week of the 20th, that week of—what is it, the main event? It's one of the major events in the UN on the 22nd, 23rd, 24th, 25th, its high week or whatever they call it. They're going to make some big decisions. And so, the Lord said, 'Pray over that.' So, then as I was praying into that, I saw them practicing demonic witchcraft. They were sacrificing a human. I actually saw a human. It was demonic. Everything I was seeing was demonic of what they were doing to conjure up through human sacrifice a Hitler spirit to come over Europe. And then I saw war break out in a greater measure. Oh, thank you, Holy Spirit. I saw Italy divided. I'm talking about a major earthquake hits Italy. And as it hits Italy, it strikes the Vatican. And the walls of the Vatican—there's walls in the Vatican that get massive cracks. Massive cracks are going to split the foundation of the Vatican in the days ahead. And this is symbolic for what's about to take place for a major outpouring of the Spirit of God on the Catholic people, for a great shaking is coming to the Vatican. And I saw the very foundation and buildings in that area where they have all their buildings there and where the Pope lives. I saw it being shaken to the point where there were cracks in the buildings and they had to vacate because it was not safe to be in them. They were uninhabitable in certain buildings in the Vatican because of the old structure. They're old buildings. And when it happens, I saw splits in the foundation and in the walls that were big. And the Lord told me it was symbolic, similar to when Jesus died and the curtain was rent. You know how it rent; it was ripped from top to bottom. And that's what I'm trying to tell you. There's a great shaking that's going to take place in the Vatican in the days ahead with a major earthquake, and it will be symbolic of a new movement that will come upon the Catholic people, and a major outpouring of the Spirit of God will show up in this generation like we've never seen before, and revival will hit the Catholic Church. That's what I saw. And the Lord told me, he said, 'I'm going to visit the Catholic people, Braden. There's going to be a major revival in the Catholic Church. There's going to be some doctrine issues that are going to be set straight. Some cleansing of the house.' And the Lord showed me this. I don't know how long the revival lasts, you all, but I'm telling you, it's coming. A great, great harvest of souls around this world. And there's 1.4 billion Catholics throughout the whole world. And the Lord said, 'Brandon, they're one of the—it's the major hub of religion of what represents Christianity around the world. And in this, I will visit the Catholic people with a major move of my spirit upon the Catholic Church, and people are going to get radically born again. They're going to get radically transformed by the Spirit of God. You're going to see it—it's glorious.' But I saw a shaking coming to Italy, and it was almost like it was divided. It was such a great shaking. And I don't know if that's symbolically or an actual earthquake, but I'm telling you, I saw the Vatican have massive cracks in the walls, so much so that they didn't feel safe to be in those rooms anymore and they had to evacuate. So I saw a lot. Then the Lord showed me a major—I'll be careful with this. I am not a financial adviser. I'm not a financial adviser. I tell you what I see when I pray, and this is not financial advice. I'm not telling you to invest in or do anything with. I'm just trying to tell you I've seen something coming. And this is me just being a watchman. You do what you want to do with what I've been told. But I'm not telling you to invest or not to invest. I'm telling you what I've seen. Okay? You pray about it yourself. That's what it is—it's a call to prayer. It's not a call to tell you to do anything. But I saw, and I'm just going to be careful how I say it because I have so many people watching me. I saw in the days ahead a new Michael Saylor coming on for a certain cryptocurrency, sponsoring it, and being a mouthpiece to a certain cryptocurrency in the days ahead like a Michael Saylor was to Bitcoin. And this will be—if I say it, I won't say how I saw it happening. What do you think? Because I won't give all of it, but I'll give a piece. Okay. This man is in the Hamptons. I saw the Hamptons and the Lord spoke to me specifically about this man, and he is a tech guy. This man will become more of—it's almost like a Mark Cuban, how he does tech—and he will radically sponsor Solana. He will radically sponsor Solana is what I saw him do, and he will be a mouthpiece like Michael Saylor was to Bitcoin, and this person will rise up in the days ahead and really say a lot about Solana, and I don't know why he picked that one. I don't understand it. I'm just telling you what I saw. I saw this man really coming out like a Michael Saylor concerning Solana, and like I said, I'm not going to go into the rest of it, but I saw strategic things of investment and things that were attached to this with certain companies, and I saw the price target. I saw it all. The Lord showed me what was coming, and I'm telling you this man will become a major mouthpiece and he's in the Hampton area. He has a house in the Hamptons as the Lord showed me, because I saw it was very detailed, everything the Lord showed me concerning this. I saw a certain cryptocurrency that will be used for a two-layer protection concerning—it's a two-layer protection. One layer was spiky, the other layer was a backup layer for AI hacking. It was a way to be like, you know, how McAfee was like, you know, you download this on your computer and it protects you from having antivirus, all this from hackers or whatever, it tries to protect you. Well, this certain cryptocurrency would be a buddy to others and it was a two-layer protection. And it was not able to be penetrated for banks to use it for a way of protecting their clients' information. There are very embarrassing moments that are coming to banks in the days ahead. Major banks. I will not name the banks because then they'll say you're trying to defraud us. I'm not. But there were major banks, four in particular, that will have cyber breaches that will be very embarrassing to them, leaking clients' information and stealing money out of accounts by fraud on a deep level. And they'll try to cover it up because it's very embarrassing because they breached their wall. And the Lord said they will use in the days ahead, they will use AI to do this. It will be a form of another level of what we're about to see. The Lord said, 'of a beast system. This is no longer safe.' So we need this, and we need this to protect us. So they use these certain cryptos. It's the technology—the Lord always said to me, he said, 'Brandon, follow their function. Follow the function. If they have a function and they provide a service, follow it. Educate yourself.' He said, 'Do not become dumb when it comes to things. Educate yourself. What does this function have to do to protect or provide a service for that?' And it's two walls of layer of protection that are impenetrable. So that's what the Lord was showing me, and he said embarrassing moments are coming: cyber breaches concerning personal data, and it will be in the news concerning social security numbers, bank account information, and private information concerning four major banks, one in particular that will be very pronounced in the news, and it will be embarrassing for them. So they'll have a problem and then they'll have a solution coming, and the solution is an opportunity to become wealthy. So I've said enough. But I tell you these things because I get this stuff by the spirit of God. And He tells me to pray for it, and He warns me. He said, 'Nothing is done in this earth until He reveals it to the prophetic voices first.' And I've warned you. I don't believe I'm a prophetic voice; I'm a watchman. I'll say it and say it a thousand times. I believe what our job is to do on this platform is to pray. I know there's a lot of other people that call themselves prophet so-and-so and prophet this and that. Folks, that's not Brandon. I've never been—I'm not a self-appointed prophet. I've never had an elder come on and say, 'Brandon, I've called you, laid hands on you. God's appointed you for such a time as this to be a prophetic voice to the nations.' And I don't want to be self-proclaimed. The Lord told me, 'You go on and pray.' And every one of us are called to pray. And I feel that the Lord has given me these visions to warn the people of what's coming to pray and intercede for the nations. And so far, we see what the Lord is showing us in the news before it happens. And so I look for fruit. If there's no fruit, you're flaky. Sit down and shut up, you know. But everybody's called to pray. But I don't want to be a person that's a distraction in any area, especially on YouTube. There's too much static. There's too much. Everybody's got a word; everybody's got something to say. My word of what I want to tell you is, let's pray. If I bring something to you and it witnesses with you of what the Lord is telling me, that we're being propelled into another stratosphere of the end times in these last seconds. I hear all kinds of people have said to me, 'Brandon, you are such a false prophet,' and all this stuff, and I'm like, I never claimed to be a prophet. All I come to believe is, I'm going to tell you all, is I'm called to pray. If you want to pray with me, fine. I love to pray with y'all. But either way, I'm going to pray on my own, and I'll get these, and I'll put it down, and whenever you see me in the Hamptons and I'm witnessing to the people up there, then don't get mad at me. But either way, I'm going to do what God's called me to do. And I know that He's called me to witness to the rich and to tell them they need to repent and get their hearts right before God before it's too late. They won't listen to somebody who is broke. Do you understand? And God is reaching out to everybody. And I believe with all my heart He's raising up people that have influence with finances to say, 'Listen, God has a way for you to get born again. And you need to repent regardless.' He's called to the rich and He's called to the poor. He's called to the middle class, but He's called to everybody to get them born again because He said, 'I don't want any man to perish, but all come to repentance.' And there's a lot of people who get ticked off about that. But to me, I'm just a person on YouTube that prays. And if you want to pray with me, fine. If you don't, fine. But I'm just telling you what's coming and what I feel the Lord has told me. But I feel the anointing of the Holy Spirit right now. That's why I go—isn't that interesting? But just on things like this, I feel His presence so dear, so strong tonight again as I've been praying over the finances in particular, Wednesday. Wednesday, the Lord spoke to me specifically. He said, "Wednesday is a big day. Pray. Wednesday of this week is a big day." He told me that when I was driving out. I was praying in the spirit, and he said Wednesday. And in less than 48 hours will be the beginning of the wave. You'll see this. Pray over this. Pray into this. This is Satan's wheelhouse. Do you understand? He is the god over this world of finances, concerning finances, and he's able to manipulate, and he does his little puppet games. So we don't let up off the gas when you see any kind of breakthrough. You keep making it a greasy spot. You keep hitting it until it becomes a greasy spot in the spirit realm. You go, "Well, we got a little victory, brother. I'm going to let up off the rope." No, you're foolish. Keep hitting it until it's a greasy spot. I never, at the first sign of victory of anything when it comes to any breakthrough in my life, do I give up and go, "Well, it's time to let go. We won. Hallelujah!" I don't do that ever. You keep hitting it until it doesn't exist anymore and another level—you know what I'm saying? You know you got the victory. And so I want you to believe bigger. Believe bigger in these last days. Believe for bigger. God wants to show up and show off in your life. As I saw Trump declare that he will stand with Israel, I saw a window of opportunity that the Lord said, "I'm breathing on the Abrahamic covenant like this generation has never seen before." I'm breathing on the Abrahamic covenant, Brandon, and you will see great blessing on those that bless him versus those that curse him. And he said, "Remember what I told you: five levels of shaking." Not all people will experience the same shaking. Some, it will be politics,. Some will be in the earth with the crust, the shaking of the earth. Finances shaking—with finances like with Canada and the things I've seen concerning Canada, shaking of the finances. Shaking in the church—Italy, the Vatican, all that thing. Shaking of the church, shaking in the land, shaking in the heavens. But altogether a fivefold shaking, five major shakings will take place all at the same time. As labor pains upon a woman, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. So we are seeing that manifest, and the time of the point of no return, I believe, is coming in the next couple of days, in the next couple of weeks, when we get to Rosh Hashanah. Pay attention to this time frame. Pay attention to the Feast of Trumpets. Pay attention to it. I'm telling you, this is something significant in the spirit realm. And that's when I saw fire on the days after. Fire—those days on a calendar became lit up with fire and they started burning, and I saw trouble coming to America. And that's when I heard the angels—remember when I told you I heard there's decisions, anti-Semitism, we see all this stuff. But that's when the Lord said, "Brandon, you're going to see blessing upon Donald Trump's thinking. You're going to see blessing on Donald Trump's thinking. You have a window of opportunity." He keeps talking about, "For a harvest, you have a window of opportunity." How does that line up with everything? I told everybody. Do you understand? You can see good and bad at the same time with where we are in the end times. A rising up of anti-Semitism, a rising up of war. You can see rumors of wars. You can see all—you can see the glorious church. You can see the people running to Jesus with what happened this last week with this tragic event. People are going to church, but you have craziness happening and the glory happening at the exact same time. And people go, "Well, how are we going to see this, Brandon? That doesn't make any sense." Well, nothing ever makes sense in the spirit realm. I'm telling you, if you're thinking natural, the natural man perceiveth not the things of God. The Bible already told us that the natural man's not going to perceive it. You can't be thinking in the natural. You have to be thinking spirit-minded. I'm led by my spirit, not led by my flesh. I refuse to be a fleshy person. I want to be a spirit person, led by the Holy Ghost concerning everything. So, as the days get darker, the church is going to get brighter. The true church, the true ekklesia, the true body of believers, the true church that has a backbone like a crowbar that says, "Satan, thus far, no further. You are not going to do this." The Erica's rising up and saying, "I'm taking my husband's legacy and I'm going to make his name great in this earth with Jesus, right? I'm not going to let it die." Not making his name great again, but making Jesus's name great because of what her husband said. I reframe that, okay? Forgive me. But I'm saying making Jesus's name great through their ministry. It's not making man's name great in every area. So, like I said, backtrack that. But just saying God is about to show up and show off in people's lives that just say yes, that just say yes, "Here am I." And that's why you're going to see darkness. You're going to see shaking. You're going to see a virus that's about to come on the scene in about a year or so ahead, two years from now. You'll see a virus come on the scene. You're going to see all these major shakings because we are in the end of the end. And what did he say was going to happen? There'll be wars. There'll be rumors of wars. There'll be plagues. There'll be pestilence. There'll be famine. There'll be all these things. For this is the beginning of sorrows. But the time is not yet. It's not yet. But the gospel must be preached to all the nations as a witness, and then the end will come. And I'm telling you, North Korea and a lot of people in China and in Asia, the Lord said, "I have not forgotten you." That's what he said to me. "I have not forgotten them." There'll be a major harvest in North Korea. There'll be a major harvest in Asia all around because those people feel that they have been forgotten. "What about us?" And the Lord said, "Brandon, a major harvest of souls is coming, and the Iron Curtain is coming down in North Korea, and I will deal with Kim. I will deal with his sister, and I will deal with this, and it will be a window of opportunity for the church to bring in the harvest. It won't last forever.
